title: rubus × aulonensis
intro: Rubus × aulonensis, also known as Aulonensis Bramble or Himalayan Raspberry, is a hybrid species of raspberry that is native to the Himalayan region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus × aulonensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health, as well as possessing antimicrobial and antiviral properties. The herbal preparations of Rubus × aulonensis include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
